zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Leigh of Walton於1516年出生在英國素瑞沃爾頓 奧 馮 希爾時，她的父親Giles Leigh46歲，母親Catherine43歲。她於1531年8月7日與John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1558年8月7日在英國艾可享年42歲，埋葬在英國艾可武特萊斯福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Leigh of Walton于1516年出生在英国素瑞沃爾頓 奧 馮 希爾时，她的父亲Giles Leigh46岁，母亲Catherine43岁。她于1531年8月7日与John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1558年8月7日在英国艾可享年42岁，埋葬在英国艾可武特萊斯福德。

nameMeanings.name: Leigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

variants.name: Leah
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 李 and 利, see   Li   1 and 3.

variants.name: Lee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sang, Jae, Jong, Jung, Sung, Yong, Kyung, Seung, Dong, Kwang, Myung.

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a meadow or a patch of arable land, Middle English lee, lea, from Old English lēa, dative case (used after a preposition) of lēah, which originally meant ‘wood or glade’.

English: habitational name from any of the many places in England named with Old English lēah ‘wood, glade’, including Lee in Buckinghamshire, Essex, Hampshire, Kent, and Shropshire, and Lea in Cheshire, Derbyshire, Herefordshire, Lancashire, Lincolnshire, and Wiltshire.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Leigh of Walton was born in 1516, in Walton on the Hill, Surrey, England, her father, Giles Leigh, was 46 and her mother, Catherine, was 43. She married John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted on 7 August 1531, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 7 August 1558, in Essex, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in Uttlesford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Leigh of Walton est née en 1516, à Walton on the Hill, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Giles Leigh, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Catherine, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted le 7 août 1531, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 août 1558, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à Uttlesford, Essex, Angleterre.

August 1531 in Essex, England, United Kingdom John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Leigh of Waltonが1516年にイギリススリーワルトン オン ス ヒルで生まれた時，父Giles Leighは46歳，母Catherineは43歳であった。1531年8月7日にイギリスイギリスエセックスでJohn Allen or Alleyne of Thaxtedと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1558年8月7日にイギリスエセックスで42歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスウットレスフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Leigh of Walton(이)가 1516년 영국 수리 월턴  테 힐에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giles Leigh(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1531년 8월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1558년 8월 7일 영국 에세스에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 우틀레스퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Leigh of Walton nasceu em 1516, em Walton on the Hill, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Leigh, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Catherine, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted em 7 de agosto de 1531, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de agosto de 1558, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em Uttlesford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.Walton on the Hill, Surrey, England: валтон он т хилл, сурри, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Leigh of Walton родилась в 1516 г. в местности валтон он т хилл, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Giles Leigh было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Allen or Alleyne of Thaxted 7 августа 1531 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 7 августа 1558 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности уттлесфорд, эссекс, Англия.
